detail.description:
"Romance of the Three Kingdoms: Hadou" is a strategy simulation game where you fight alongside the unique military commanders of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms!
The first smartphone app for Koei Tecmo's "Romance of the Three Kingdoms" series is now available in its 35th anniversary!
Set on a vast continent, the military commanders of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms clash in real time and compete for everything!
Aim to unify China with the military commanders of the Romance of the Three King
